description: HM Land Registry maintains land and property registration services and publishes land/property datasets for England and Wales. It also provides business integration interfaces for conveyancing, title, search, and application-submission workflows.
summary: HM Land Registry exposes public HTTP APIs including the Use land and property data REST API and a cataloged Deed API, plus gated Business Gateway REST APIs for conveyancing and land-register workflows.

surfaces.name: Use land and property data API
